commit_message:

@Jorge @Liam If the failure of pap is indeed a password complexity issue - it relates to the passwords generated by the common policy chart. I would guess that sometimes the passwords generated will be fine (because they don't contain troublesome characters) and sometimes they will not. Each time you redeploy a new password will be generated (correct me if I am wrong). This issue is known in oom. It may cause intermittent failures here.

CPS and other components use the values.yaml parameter "passwordStrengthOverride = basic" to avoid these troublesome characters in generated passwords. If indeed this error is caused by passwords characters, this should permanently fix the issue.
